ns0:entry.ns0:title: BuilderIO/agent-native
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BuilderIO/agent-native
Language: typescript
A framework for building agent-native applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
Language: typescript
Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JCodesMore/ai-website-cloner-template
Language: typescript
Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KeygraphHQ/shannon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KeygraphHQ/shannon
Language: typescript
Shannon is an autonomous, white-box AI pentester for web applications and APIs. It analyzes your source code, identifies attack vectors, and executes real exploits to prove vulnerabilities before they reach production.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Mentra-Community/MentraOS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Mentra-Community/MentraOS
Language: typescript
MentraOS is the leading smart glasses OS. See live captions, stream your view, talk to AI, and capture photos hands-free on compatible glasses.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Stirling-Tools/Stirling-PDF
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Stirling-Tools/Stirling-PDF
Language: typescript
#1 PDF Application on GitHub that lets you edit PDFs on any device anywhere

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
Language: typescript
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a git repository (Github, Gitlab, Azure, Local) or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph with a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alibaba/page-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alibaba/page-agent
Language: typescript
JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firecrawl/firecrawl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl
Language: typescript
The API to search, scrape, and interact with the web at scale. 🔥

ns0:entry.ns0:title: garrytan/gstack
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/garrytan/gstack
Language: typescript
Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 23 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grafana/grafana
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grafana/grafana
Language: typescript
The open and composable observability and data visualization platform. Visualize metrics, logs, and traces from multiple sources like Prometheus, Loki, Elasticsearch, InfluxDB, Postgres and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: heygen-com/hyperframes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/heygen-com/hyperframes
Language: typescript
Write HTML. Render video. Built for agents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jamiepine/voicebox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jamiepine/voicebox
Language: typescript
The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: koala73/worldmonitor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koala73/worldmonitor
Language: typescript
Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mksglu/context-mode
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mksglu/context-mode
Language: typescript
Context window optimization for AI coding agents. Sandboxes tool output (98% reduction), persists session memory, and enforces routing across 17 platforms via MCP + hooks.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: modem-dev/hunk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modem-dev/hunk
Language: typescript
Review-first terminal diff viewer for agentic coders

ns0:entry.ns0:title: stablyai/orca
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/stablyai/orca
Language: typescript
Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.
